name: Nave Bank
description_short: Nave Bank is Puerto Rico's first digital-only bank offering business checking accounts, savings products, and business loans with transparent pricing and real-time account management.
description_long:
Nave Bank is a digital banking platform founded specifically to serve small business owners in Puerto Rico. The company positions itself as the island's first bank created with a digital-first approach, operating under FDIC insurance (OCIF B-40 charter) and a routing number (021508222). The bank launched with a mission to simplify financial services by reducing obstacles and increasing transparency in business banking.

Nave Bank's core offerings include Cuenta Nave Business (business checking accounts) with real-time balance information and mobile deposit capabilities, savings accounts earning 3% APY (2.75% APY on balances over $10,000; 1.50% APY on smaller balances), and Nave Préstamo para Negocio (business loans). The platform emphasizes consolidated account management, allowing users to manage multiple business accounts from a single dashboard. Their service model includes live customer support (Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm) via chat, email (hola@navebank.com), WhatsApp, and a help center.

Nave Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on transparency (zero hidden fees), simplified application processes, rapid credit decisions on loans, and competitive rates. The platform uses high-security standards and integrates technology-first solutions for digital banking. Their marketing emphasizes convenience, human support, and operational simplicity tailored to small business needs in Puerto Rico's market.

The primary caveat is geographic limitation—Nave Bank operates exclusively in Puerto Rico, making it inaccessible to mainland U.S. businesses. Interest rates on savings are variable and subject to change at the bank's discretion. Loan approval is subject to credit review, and the platform appears designed for smaller to mid-size business operations rather than enterprise accounts. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business savings accounts with variable APY (3%, tiered by balance)
Real-time balance information and account management
Live customer support via chat, email, and WhatsApp
Help center and account support resources
Account security and fraud protection services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with legitimate Puerto Rico banking charter (OCIF B-40)
3% APY on savings deposits with tiered rates (2.75% for $10k+, 1.50% for smaller balances)
Real-time account balance visibility and consolidated multi-account management from single dashboard
Mobile deposit and real-time payment capabilities (ACH, wire transfers)
Zero hidden fees and transparent pricing structure explicitly stated on website
Fast loan application process with rapid credit decisions on business loans
Live human customer support available via chat, email, WhatsApp during business hours
Dedicated business accounts designed for operational and savings components
cons: Exclusively serves Puerto Rico—not available for mainland U.S. businesses
Variable interest rates subject to change at bank's discretion with no rate-lock guarantees
Minimum balance requirements for APY tiers ($10,000 minimum for highest 2.75% rate)
Limited information on loan terms, amounts, eligibility criteria, and approval timeline specifics
No mention of business credit card products, lines of credit, or equipment financing beyond basic loans

contact.address: 1608 Ave Ponce De Leon, San Juan, PR 00909

best_for: Small to mid-size business owners operating in Puerto Rico seeking simplified digital banking
Puerto Rico-based businesses wanting to consolidate accounts with transparent, hidden-fee-free operations
Small business owners looking for business loans with faster approval processes than traditional banks
Puerto Rico entrepreneurs prioritizing customer service and human support alongside digital convenience
diagnosis: Nave Bank is best for small business owners and entrepreneurs operating in Puerto Rico who prioritize digital convenience, transparent pricing, and human customer support without geographic limitations. The main caveat is that it operates exclusively in Puerto Rico—mainland U.S. businesses cannot open accounts, making this a Puerto Rico-specific solution only.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1608 Ave Ponce De Leon, San Juan, PR 00909
meta_description: Nave Bank is Puerto Rico's first digital-only bank offering business checking accounts, savings products, and business loans with transparent pricing.
